prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Nausea, reduced appetite, and fatigue over the last 1-2 months with ongoing renal function decline.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 81.2 kg; Height 181.3 cm; BMI 24.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 135/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.6%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 9.5%), FPG (12 months ago 266mg/dL; 9 months ago 308mg/dL; 6 months ago 265mg/dL; 3 months ago 254mg/dL; current 203mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 79.3kg; 9 months ago 79.3kg; 6 months ago 80.1kg; 3 months ago 77.9kg; current 81.2kg), Height (12 months ago 181.3cm; 9 months ago 181.3cm; 6 months ago 181.3cm; 3 months ago 181.3cm; current 181.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 135mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 135mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 130U/L; 9 months ago 124U/L; 6 months ago 125U/L; 3 months ago 131U/L; current 125U/L), AST (12 months ago 78U/L; 9 months ago 72U/L; 6 months ago 72U/L; 3 months ago 80U/L; current 74U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; current 20mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 248mg/g; 9 months ago 355mg/g; 6 months ago 387mg/g; 3 months ago 307mg/g; current 369mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 85mg/dL; 3 months ago 88mg/dL; current 89mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 55mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 55mg/dL; 3 months ago 58mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 109mg/dL; 9 months ago 116mg/dL; 6 months ago 127mg/dL; 3 months ago 109mg/dL; current 121mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
